call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright. Sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Sighs) Look, you guys called me yesterday. Where did you even *get* my number? 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's highway robbery! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: I don't need rewards points! I need a reasonable interest rate! This is ridiculous. I'm not interested. Don't call me again. 
Agent: Sir, please… 
Robert: (Hangs up)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David calling from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred by our partner, GreenTech Solutions. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, hi! They said you guys had good rates. I'm looking at a big purchase. 
Agent: Wonderful! We can definitely help. Based on your profile, we're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What are you planning to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm buying a used car. I found a really good deal, but I need the financing. 
Agent: Excellent. A reliable vehicle is important. The monthly payments would be around $290 for 60 months. We also have options for 36 and 48 months if you'd like a faster payoff. 
Jessica: Hmm, $290… that's pretty good. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $150 origination fee, but we're waiving it for referrals from GreenTech. 
Jessica: Oh, really? That's awesome! 
Agent: Yes! And we can also look at adjusting the loan term to fit your budget even better. Would you like me to run some scenarios? 
Jessica: Yeah, that would be great. Maybe a 48-month term? 
Agent: Absolutely. One moment… Okay, with a 48-month term, your monthly payments would be approximately $330. 
Jessica: Okay, I think I like the 60-month option better. Let's go with that. 
Agent: Perfect! Let's get the paperwork started…

Agent: Hello Michael, this is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Yeah, hi. I'm just looking for something to help build my credit. 
Agent: Great! We can definitely help with that. We're offering a $1000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 17.99%. It's a great way to establish a positive credit history. 
Michael: 17.99%? That seems a little high, doesn't it? 
Agent: Well, sir, given your credit score, that's the best rate we can offer at this time. But it's a secured card, so it's a good starting point. 
Michael: Hmm. I was hoping for something lower. I'll have to think about it. 
Agent: Okay, I understand. We can also explore other options, but they might require a co-signer. 
Michael: No, I don't want to involve anyone else. I think I'll just… look around some more. 
Agent: Alright. If you change your mind, please don't hesitate to call us back. Here's my direct extension…

Agent: Hello Ms. Rodriguez, this is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special personal loan program… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) Where did you get my number?! I never asked for this! 
Agent: Ma'am, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $5000 Personal Loan at 24.99%. 
Patricia: 24.99?! You're trying to rip me off! I'm already struggling to make ends meet! This is outrageous! I'm reporting you to the Better Business Bureau! 
Agent: Ma'am, please… let me explain… 
Patricia: (Hangs up abruptly)
